provider: The Education University of Hong Kong 2026/27 Undergraduate Programme Course List

supplements.evidenceNote: The official 2026/27 course-list PDF publishes 22 unique codes and titles under the broad Major Course List, including the combined-code Component II, Component III and INS4085/INS4086 rows. It does not map the listed courses to the programme page's internal Core, Major Interdisciplinary, Major Elective or Living and Working in Our Country subtotals, and it does not publish coded Final Year Project, Minor/Elective, General Education or Language Enhancement lists. Only the compulsory Internship's 3 credit points are stated directly on the programme page; other per-course credits and the recommended year/semester pattern remain unknown.
